title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. multifolia
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. multifolia, also known as Kidney Vetch, is a flowering plant species within the legume family (Fabaceae) that is commonly found in temperate regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. multifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Kidney Vetch can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including urinary tract infections and skin conditions.
